start.text: Morning Uncle Lim! You seem happy today! How are you feeling?
start.speaker: player

options.response: Aiyo, thank you, thank you. I have been feeling really good. Luckily, my donor kidney transplant coming soon... So happy to hear it after so long of waiting.

fasting_check.text: So glad to hear that, Uncle! Don't worry, we will take good care of you. You started fasting since midnight?
fasting_check.speaker: player

options.response: Of course! I want to get well fast so I can go coffee shop, drink kopi and see my friends.

options.text: Uncle, you miss your friends already ah? No one to talk 4D with you?
options.response: Hahaha! You really know my heart. Actually ah, whether is the kopi or the kakis, I just miss being outside.

options.text: Once you discharge, what's the first thing you want to eat? Don't say hospital porridge ah!
options.response: Hahaha! You really know my heart. Actually ah, whether is the kopi or the kakis, I just miss being outside.
Actually hor, I stay here so long already... I tell my son, this pretty Nurse is like my own granddaughter like that. Every day come check on me, so happily... makes me feel not so lonely.

granddaughter.text: Uncle, don't say that lah! Later I cry. You are my favorite patient, you know? Once you recover, then we talk about your coffee shop stories again, okay?
granddaughter.speaker: player

options.response: Okay, okay. I won't hold you up on your work. Don't let me take up too much of your time!
